Our Specialized Petroleum Services

Comprehensive solutions built on safety, precision and proven industry expertise

UPP and GI Piping Solutions

We professionally supply and install both UPP (Underground Pre-insulated Piping) and Galvanized Iron (GI) piping systems for fuel distribution. Our installations guarantee long-term durability, leak prevention, and compliance with international petroleum handling standards.

Calibration & Testing services

We calibrate and test pumps, tanks and meters to ensure accuracy , prevent losses and meet legal compliance standards

Petroleum Equipment Supply
We supply a comprehensive range of petroleum-related equipment and accessories, including :Composite manhole covers Submersible pumps Pump Motor Assemblies (PMAs)Air gauges and installation kits UPP pipes and fittings Galvanized Iron (GI) pipes Weld-on fittings Nozzles, hoses, breakaways Valves, filters, flow meters Tank vents, seals, and couplings All fittings are quality-certified and sourced from globally trusted brands.
Petroleum infrastructure constraction

We build fuel stations , pipelines and bulk storage systems with full regulatory compliance . Our projects are delivered on time and built to last

Project planning & Turnkey Management

From feasibility to commissioning . we manage projects end - to - end for smooth execution and optimal results

Regulatory Consultancy & Permitting

We help clients navigate Licensing , ElA processes and petroleum regulatory compliance with ease and accuracy

Preventive &Corrective Maintanace

We provide scheduled maintenance and emergency repairs to maximize uptime and ensure safe , efficient operations

Fuel Pump Supply & Installation

Luis Petroleum Services supplies and installs a wide range of fuel dispensing pumps suitable for both retail and commercial applications. Our pump installation services ensure precision, safety, and minimal downtime.

Tank Supply, Installation & Calibration

We provide above-ground and underground fuel storage tanks, handling complete delivery, installation, and calibration services to ensure volume accuracy, leak prevention, and regulatory compliance.a

Civil Works & Canopy Construction

Our civil works department handles full construction services including:

Site excavation and preparation

Driveways, forecourts, and drainage

Canopy design and construction

We deliver structurally sound and aesthetically designed facilities that meet client specifications and local regulations.

Automation of Service Stations

We provide advanced automation solutions to modernize service stations, including:

Point-of-Sale (POS) systems

Automatic Tank Gauging (ATG)aPump control and fuel monitoring systems

Inventory management and reporting software

Automation improves operational efficiency, accuracy, and security.
